---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new command, agent, skill, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like?

A clear description of the feature or improvement.

## Why is this useful?

How would this help you or other Salesforce admins/developers?

## How should it work?

Describe the expected behavior. For example:
- What command would you type? (e.g., `/my-command`)
- What output would you see?

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you have considered.

## Your role

- [ ] Salesforce Admin
- [ ] Salesforce Developer
- [ ] DevOps / Release Manager
- [ ] Other: ___
